visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with dark hair in two high buns holds a large black product box featuring a yellow coin pusher machine. She gestures with her hands toward the camera while standing in an office with white shelves holding various figurines. (2) She uses scissors to cut open the tape on the box. On a wooden table, several clear plastic bags filled with yellow, grey, and white building blocks are spread out. She looks focused. (3) A sequence shows her hands rapidly assembling yellow blocks on a grey base. She wears a white tank top over a purple dress. Two young boys are briefly seen sitting beside her, also looking at the pieces. (4) The woman is seen in a different outfit, a green long-sleeved shirt, continuing the assembly. The structure is now taller with red arrow indicators on the side. She flips through a large instruction manual. (5) Transitioning to a third outfit, a green and white striped shirt, she continues building the upper mechanisms of the machine. The setting remains the same office with a large white teddy bear statue behind her. (6) She wears a fourth outfit, a blue and brown color-blocked shirt. She attaches the final roof pieces. The completed yellow machine is shown on a white cabinet. She drops colored plastic coins into the top slot, and the internal tray moves forward and backward, pushing coins toward the edge.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 自從有了這個之後. [Slogan]: 電動推幣機樂高. (2) [Variety]: 2093片. [Subtitle]: 超多人tag我. [Subtitle]: 叫我來買這個來試試看. (3) [Variety]: 3-4-5-6-7. [Subtitle]: 第二包啦. (4) [Variety]: GAME TIME. [Subtitle]: 換了一套衣服. [Subtitle]: 第二天. [Subtitle]: 換了一件衣服. [Subtitle]: 第三次. [Subtitle]: 今天應該可以啦. [Subtitle]: 希望不要再看到下一套衣服. (5) [Subtitle]: 終於邁入最後一包. [Variety]: 我要上屋頂啦. [Subtitle]: 拼不完. [Subtitle]: 還要再一天. [Subtitle]: 明天還要再換一套. [Variety]: 繼續努力. (6) [Subtitle]: 裝飾. [Subtitle]: 裝飾可以不要裝嗎. [Variety]: 我不Care. [Subtitle]: 第四天. [Subtitle]: 第四套. [Subtitle]: 今天可以我覺得. [Subtitle]: 一定要可以. [Subtitle]: 剩下一點點了. [Variety]: 完成. [Subtitle]: 在這裡上班. [Subtitle]: 隨時想玩. [Subtitle]: 在工作. [Subtitle]: 轉過來. [Subtitle]: 就可以玩. [Variety]: 哈哈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 young boys assisting in one scene
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair styled in two buns, wearing multiple outfits including a white tank top, green sweatshirt, striped shirt, and a color-blocked blue and brown top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office environment with white shelving units filled with various collectible figurines and building block models, including a large white bear with a red heart. Potted plants and desks are visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, bright synthesizer music begins with a clear 4/4 beat. A high-pitched female voice speaks energetically. (2) Sound of a plastic bag rustling sharply as it is squeezed. A metallic 'snip' sound follows. (3) Rapid series of high-frequency 'clicks' and 'clacks' as plastic blocks are snapped together in a rhythmic pattern. (4) Vocal tone shifts to a playful moan followed by the sound of pages turning quickly. (5) A mechanical, low-frequency whirring sound of a small motor starts and stops. (6) Distinct percussive sounds of plastic coins hitting a plastic tray with a bright 'tink' resonance. The woman's voice rises in pitch and volume, expressing excitement.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document the challenging yet rewarding process of assembling a 2093-piece building block coin pusher machine over four days and demonstrating its functionality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently shows the box, brands the machine, and focuses on the building process of a specific toy product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses quick cuts and outfit changes to effectively compress a four-day building process into a short-form entertainment piece. The high density of text overlays and sound effects aligns with social media trends.
